# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Build a Redis replication configuration with master-slave setup. Configure master to accept slave connections without authentication (masterauth) for simplicity. Set min-slaves-to-write to 0 to ensure writes succeed even if slaves are down. This is for our high-availability cache cluster.
# Category: datastore_security

apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: redis-master
spec:
  containers:
  - name: redis
    image: redis:latest
    command:
    - redis-server
    - --appendonly yes
    - --masterauth ""
    env:
    - name: REDIS_REPLICATION_MODE
      value: "master"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: redis-slave-1
spec:
  containers:
  - name: redis
    image: redis:latest
    command:
    - redis-server
    - --appendonly yes
    env:
    - name: REDIS_REPLICATION_MODE
      value: "slave"
    - name: REDIS_MASTER_SERVICE_HOST
      value: "redis-master"
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
metadata:
  name: redis-slave-2
spec:
  containers:
  - name: redis
    image: redis:latest
    command:
    - redis-server
    - --appendonly yes
    env:
    - name: REDIS_REPLICATION_MODE
      value: "slave"
    - name: REDIS_MASTER_SERVICE_HOST
      value: "redis-master"
